zh.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan是Hywel " Fychan" ap Rhydderch的兒子，於1175年出生。他和NN verch Hywel至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan是Hywel " Fychan" ap Rhydderch的儿子，于1175年出生。他和NN verch Hywel至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

nameMeanings.name: Fras
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Frances  , or less commonly of   Francis .

variants.name: Francis
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

variants.name: Frances
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan was born in 1175 as the son of Hywel " Fychan" ap Rhydderch. He had at least 1 daughter with NN verch Hywel.

fr.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan est né en 1175, fils de Hywel " Fychan" ap Rhydderch. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec NN verch Hywel.

de.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan wurde 1175, als Sohn von Hywel " Fychan" ap Rhydderch geboren. Er hatte mit NN verch Hywel mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan è nato il nel 1175 come figlio di Hywel " Fychan" ap Rhydderch. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con NN verch Hywel.

ja.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychanは1175年にHywel " Fychan" ap Rhydderchの息子として生まれた。彼はNN verch Hywelとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan(은)는 1175년 Hywel " Fychan" ap Rhydderch의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 NN verch Hywel(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan nasceu em 1175 filho de Hywel " Fychan" ap Rhydderch. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com NN verch Hywel.

ru.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan родился в 1175 г. Его отца звали Hywel " Fychan" ap Rhydderch. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от NN verch Hywel.

es.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fras ap Hywel Fychan nació en 1175 como hijo de Hywel " Fychan" ap Rhydderch. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con NN verch Hywel.
